description_long: This set consists of three pieces of luggage: a small pink backpack, a medium-sized navy blue soft-shell suitcase, and a large blue hard-shell suitcase. The pink backpack features a rounded top, two main compartments with visible zippers, and padded shoulder straps. The medium suitcase has a rectangular shape, a telescopic handle, two front zipper pockets, and appears to be made of fabric. The largest suitcase is a hard-shell model with a ribbed surface, a telescopic handle, and two visible wheels at the base. All three pieces are designed for portability and travel, with the suitcases offering rolling functionality and the backpack suitable for carrying on the back. The color palette is dominated by blue and pink tones, and the materials suggest a mix of plastic, fabric, and metal components.
description: A set of three luggage items: a pink backpack, a navy blue soft-shell suitcase, and a large blue hard-shell suitcase, each with handles and zippers for travel.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three pieces: the pink backpack with two compartments, the medium navy suitcase with front zippers, and the large blue hard-shell suitcase with a ribbed surface and telescopic handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the suitcases and the alignment of all three pieces, with the wheels of the largest suitcase visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hard-shell suitcase, the telescopic handle and back panel of the medium suitcase, and the backpack's shoulder straps.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view emphasizing the handles and the arrangement of the luggage, with the backpack's top and the suitcases' handles clearly visible.
attribute_handle_type: Telescopic handle on both suitcases (top), fixed top handle on both suitcases, two padded shoulder straps on backpack, small top loop handle on backpack.
attribute_zipper_configuration: Backpack: two zipper tracks (main compartment, front pocket), both double zippers. Medium suitcase: two front zipper tracks (single zippers), one main compartment zipper (double zipper). Large suitcase: one main compartment zipper (double zipper).
